mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or forward returns are positive in >55% of rising rate periods over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals labor market deterioration that reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered months or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand that supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of cases or the interaction term fails to improve model fit over additive baselines.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects capacity constraints that trigger risk-off positioning and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of declining production months within tightening regimes or the signal shows no predictive power in regime-filtered samples.

mechanism_narrative: Core inflation exceeding 2.5 percent forces aggressive central bank tightening that raises borrowing costs and compresses equity multiples over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of high-inflation threshold crossings or the signal fails to predict direction in a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate creates a tight labor market that boosts wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of observations or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth signals strong economic momentum that improves near-term corporate earnings outlooks and generates positive weekly equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of high-GDP growth periods or the signal produces a Rank IC below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase indicates expanding capacity utilization that supports earnings revisions and positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >60% of triggered months within recovery regimes or the signal loses predictive accuracy in out-of-sample validation.
